calendar.matters:
Specially Appearing Shareholder Fred Khalilians Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conferene
Kirk Hallam, Esq., for Plaintiff NL Finance
No other appearances

Matter not contested. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Specially Appearing Shareholder Fred Khalilian's Motion To Set Aside Judgment.

Khalilian's motion to vacate the July 14, 2020 judgment in favor of NL Finance Co., LLC and against Monster, Inc., Monster, LLC, and Monster Products Inc. in the amount of $48,067,424.41 and related assignment order is denied without prejudice.

(See word minutes for completed details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Judgment Creditors Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NL FINANCE CO., LLC's Motion For Assignment Order: Grant pursuant to the parties' stipulation.

Order re: non-opposition to motion for assignment order and Assignment order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
